name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Service Binary Path Set or Update
notes: This Building Block triggers when a service binary path is set or updated.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Service Binary Path Set or Update on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)
when the event matches "Target Object" IMATCHES '.*services\\.*\\ImagePath' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Service Binary Path Set or Update on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)
AND when the event matches "Target Object" IMATCHES '.*services\\.*\\ImagePath' AQL filter query
